programme.title: Big Trouble in Little China
programme.desc: Truck driver Jack Burton gets embroiled in a supernatural battle when his best friend Wang Chi's green-eyed fiancée is kidnapped by henchmen of the sorcerer Lo Pan, who must marry a girl with green eyes in order to return to the human realm.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: Hutch Mansell, a suburban dad, overlooked husband, nothing neighbor — a "nobody." When two thieves break into his home one night, Hutch's unknown long-simmering rage is ignited and propels him on a brutal path that will uncover dark secrets he fought to leave behind.

programme.title: Léon: The Professional
programme.desc: After her father, step-mother, step-sister and little brother are killed by her father's employers, the 12-year-old daughter of an abject drug dealer manages to take refuge in the apartment of a professional hitman who at her request teaches her the methods of his job so she can take her revenge on the corrupt DEA agent who ruined her life by killing her beloved brother.

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
programme.desc: After being snatched from the Green Place of Many Mothers, while the tyrants Dementus and Immortan Joe fight for power and control, the young Furiosa must survive many trials as she puts together the means to find her way home.

programme.title: Aliens
programme.desc: Ripley, the sole survivor of the Nostromo's deadly encounter with the monstrous Alien, returns to Earth after drifting through space in hypersleep for 57 years. Although her story is initially met with skepticism, she agrees to accompany a team of Colonial Marines back to LV-426.

programme.title: Ballerina
programme.desc: An assassin trained in the traditions of the Ruska Roma organization sets out to seek revenge after her father's death.

programme.title: Unforgiven
programme.desc: William Munny is a retired, once-ruthless killer turned gentle widower and hog farmer. To help support his two motherless children, he accepts one last bounty-hunter mission to find the men who brutalized a prostitute. Joined by his former partner and a cocky greenhorn, he takes on a corrupt sheriff.

programme.title: The League of Extraordinary Gentlemen
programme.desc: Renowned adventurer Allan Quatermain leads a team of extraordinary figures with legendary powers to battle the technological terror of a madman known as "The Fantom". This "League" comprises seafarer and inventor Captain Nemo, vampire Mina Harker, an invisible man named Rodney Skinner, American Secret Service Agent Tom Sawyer, the ageless and invincible Dorian Gray, and the dangerous split personality of Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: After arriving in India, Indiana Jones is asked by a desperate village to find a mystical stone. He agrees – and stumbles upon a secret cult plotting a terrible plan in the catacombs of an ancient palace.

programme.title: The Chronicles of Riddick
programme.desc: The wanted criminal Richard Bruno Riddick arrives on a planet called Helion Prime and finds himself up against an invading empire called the Necromongers, an army that plans to convert or kill all humans in the universe.

programme.title: Nobody 2
programme.desc: Workaholic assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed vacation to the small tourist town of Plummerville. However, he soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a corrupt theme-park operator, a shady sheriff, and a bloodthirsty crime boss.

programme.title: Unforgiven
programme.desc: William Munny is a retired, once-ruthless killer turned gentle widower and hog farmer. To help support his two motherless children, he accepts one last bounty-hunter mission to find the men who brutalized a prostitute. Joined by his former partner and a cocky greenhorn, he takes on a corrupt sheriff.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: A Game of Shadows
programme.desc: There is a new criminal mastermind at large (Professor Moriarty) and not only is he Holmes’ intellectual equal, but his capacity for evil and lack of conscience may give him an advantage over the detective.

programme.title: The Invisible Man Returns
programme.desc: The owner of a coal mining operation, falsely imprisoned for fratricide, takes a drug to make him invisible, despite its side effect: gradual madness.

programme.title: The Invisible Man's Revenge
programme.desc: An eager scientist tests his new formula for invisibility on an escaped fugitive. When the formula works the criminal runs off to terrorize a family he believes cheated him out of a fortune years earlier.

programme.title: The Invisible Ray
programme.desc: Dr. Janos Rukh discovers a certain type of radium that has almost magical healing properties. But the element has a dangerous side, too, and it has already started affecting Rukh. Consumed by paranoia, he begins to suspect that his wife is having an affair. Wild for revenge, Rukh hatches a deadly plot...using his own poisoned body as a weapon to kill.

programme.title: The Invisible Woman
programme.desc: Eccentric Professor Gibbs, brilliant but impractical, invents an invisibility machine and advertises for a guinea pig. What he gets is Kitty Carroll, an attractive, adventurous model, who thinks being invisible would help her settle a few scores. Complications arise when three comic gangsters steal the machine to use on their boss. But they fail to reckon with the Revenge of the Invisible Woman!

programme.title: The Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: A clumsy young man working at an impoverished flower shop discovers that the strange plant he has been nurturing has an insatiable appetite for blood, forcing him to kill to feed it.

programme.title: The Monkey
programme.desc: When twin brothers Bill and Hal find their father's old monkey toy in the attic, a series of gruesome deaths start. The siblings decide to throw the toy away and move on with their lives, growing apart over the years.

programme.title: The Monolith Monsters
programme.desc: Rocks from a meteor which grow when in contact with water threaten a sleepy Southwestern desert community.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: An ancient Egyptian priest named Imhotep is revived when a British archaeological expedition finds his mummy and one of the researchers accidentally reads an ancient life-giving spell. Imhotep escapes from the field site and searches for the reincarnation of the soul of his lover.

programme.title: The Mummy's Curse
programme.desc: An irrigation project in the rural bayous of Louisiana unearths living mummy Kharis, who was buried in quicksand twenty-five years earlier.

programme.title: The Mummy's Ghost
programme.desc: An Egyptian high priest travels to America to reclaim the bodies of ancient Egyptian princess Ananka and her living guardian mummy Kharis. Learning that Ananka's spirit has been reincarnated into another body, he kidnaps a young woman of Egyptian descent with a mysterious resemblance to the princess. However, the high priest's greedy desires cause him to lose control of the mummy.

programme.title: The Mummy's Hand
programme.desc: A couple of comical, out-of-work archaeologists (Dick Foran and Wallace Ford) in Egypt discover evidence of the burial place of the ancient Egyptian princess Ananka. After receiving funding from an eccentric magician (Cecil Kellaway) and his beautiful daughter (Peggy Moran), they set out into the desert only to be terrorized by a sinister high priest (George Zucco) and the living mummy Kharis (Tom Tyler) who are the guardians of Ananka^Òs tomb.

programme.title: The Mummy's Tomb
programme.desc: A high priest travels to America with a living mummy to kill those who had desecrated the tomb of an Egyptian princess thirty years earlier.

programme.title: The People Under the Stairs
programme.desc: When Fool breaks into the home of his family's landlords, he discovers that they have mutilated several boys and kept them imprisoned under stairs. As Fool attempts to flee, he meets their daughter, Alice. Can Fool and Alice escape?

programme.title: The Toxic Avenger
programme.desc: When a downtrodden janitor, Winston Gooze, is exposed to a catastrophic toxic accident, he’s transformed into a new kind of hero: The Toxic Avenger. Now, Toxie must rise from outcast to savior, taking on ruthless corporate overlords and corrupt forces who threaten his son, his friends, and his community.

programme.title: The Wolf Man
programme.desc: Upon his return to his father's estate, aristocrat Larry Talbot meets a beautiful woman, attends a mystical carnival and uncovers a horrifying curse.

programme.title: They Live
programme.desc: Nada, a down-on-his-luck construction worker, discovers a pair of special sunglasses. Wearing them, he is able to see the world as it really is: people being bombarded by media and government with messages like "Stay Asleep," "No Imagination," "Submit to Authority." Even scarier is that he is able to see that some usually normal-looking people are in fact ugly aliens in charge of the massive campaign to keep humans subdued.

programme.title: Thir13en Ghosts
programme.desc: When Cyrus Kriticos, a very rich collector of unique things, dies, he leaves his house, fortune, and his prized collection of ghosts.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: A small town gradually becomes aware of a strange creature which picks off people one by one. But what is this creature, and where is it? At the same time, a seismologist is working in the area, she detects _tremors_. The creature lives underground, and can 'pop up' without warning. Trapped in their town, the town-folk have no escape.

programme.title: Tremors II: Aftershocks
programme.desc: Earl Bassett, now a washed-up ex-celebrity, is hired by a Mexican oil company to eradicate a Graboid epidemic that's killing more people each day. However, the humans aren't the only one with a new battle plan.

programme.title: Aerosmith Live Osaka, Japan 1999 Millennium Countdown 2000
Paul McCartney Back In The US
Lennon Legend - The Very Best Of John Lennon
Led Zeppelin Live Royal Albert Hall
The Who - Live At The Isle Of Wight Festival (1970)
ACDC - Live at Caste Donington, England (August 17, 1991)
The Best of Ringo Starr and his All Star Band so far
Buck Cherry and Some Cheryl Crow Woodstock 99
Tom Petty and The Heartbreakers - Storytellers (1999)
World Championship Wrestling - 7x06 - World Championship Wrestling 299
World Championship Wrestling - 7x07 - World Championship Wrestling 300
World Championship Wrestling - 8x09 - World Championship Wrestling 353
World Championship Wrestling - 8x10 - World Championship Wrestling 354
World Championship Wrestling - 8x11 - World Championship Wrestling 355
World Championship Wrestling - 8x12 - World Championship Wrestling 356
The Three Stooges
programme.desc: The Stooges new jobs have them taking the census, from an afternoon society party to a local football game. Three gung-ho census-takers let nothing stand in the way of an accurate count,whether it be crashing a fancy bridge party,spiking drinks or invoking a riot at a professional football game.

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc:
Speaking of original Creature from the Black Lagoon director Jack Arnold — in the same year he directed Revenge of the Creature, he also helmed this sci-fi tale of scientists who create a nutrient-rich miracle food that might eventually save the human race … but right now, it’s just accidentally creating a gigantic tarantula that’s causing chaos all over a desert town.
You might have heard of this giant creature feature even if you’re not a fan of the genre, as it has two major pop culture pedigrees — it featured one of Clint Eastwood‘s very first (uncredited) film performances, as a jet fighter pilot, and it is mentioned in “Science Fiction/ Double Feature,” the very first song in The Rocky Horror Picture Show (“I knew Leo G. Carroll/ was over a barrel/ When Tarantula took to the hills”).

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: D.J. decides to take up hockey and becomes the terror of the rink; Roseanne meddles to reunite Jackie and Fisher.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.sub-title: It's No Place Like Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: A Christmas Eve snowstorm scatters the Connors, with Roseanne and Jackie trapped at the Luch Box with Bev and Nana Mary, while Darlene takes shelter at David's and learns the truth about his home life.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Dan disciplines D.J. for taking offensive reading material to school-- Darlene's comic book. Dan reacts strongly when Roseanne discovers that Fisher has beaten Jackie.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2: Dan gets bailed out of jail by an amused Darlene, while rumors fly from wild to wilder, as to why he was arrested. Jackie learns why Dan was arrested, and finds herself both angry with, and touched by Dan's protective gesture. Overwhelmed, and feeling like things are moving too fast, Jackie leans on Roseanne to help her move out of Fisher's apartment. Roseanne lovingly declares that her family is officially "Poor White Trash".

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Darlene does NOT serve meat at the counter. She is forced to work there by Roseanne, but out of principal, will not serve the meat. That was her whole point

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.sub-title: Wait Till Your Father Gets Home
programme.desc: The death of their father finds Jackie blubbering, but Roseanne angry -- and sharing a drink with the "other woman" in his life.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: A wealthy and successful cousin whom Roseanne hasn't seen in 25 years comes to bury the hachet, and encourages Darlene to leave home.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: The Conners and the Tildens travel to California in a motor home, with Dan pondering his future and Ty contemplating Jackie.

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Mr.Grace has offered the staff a room in the basement where they may form their own social club. Due to the huge cost of having the room professionally decorated, the staff opt to decorate the room themselves.

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Mrs. Slocomb has exciting news when she announces that she has become engaged to a Greek man. But with looming wedding expenses she doesn't know how she'll be able to afford it, little does she know that wedding expenses are only the beginning of her problems.

programme.title: Toon in With Me
programme.sub-title: Yee Howdy Gets an Oil Change
programme.desc:
Yee Howdy takes over the studio!
Featured cartoons: Fowl Weather (1953) Feather Bluster (1958) Cat-Tastrophy (1949) Double or Mutton (1955) Corn Plastered (1951) Downhearted Duckling (1954)

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Brilliant photographer Paul Galesko plans to murder his domineering wife, Frances, and pin the crime on an ex-convict named Alvin Deschler. His plan is to make it look as if Alvin kidnapped his wife and killed her before picking up the ransom money.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude throws a fund raising party for a black militant leader and invites rich white liberals but doesn't tell them it is a fund raising party. Meanwhile, Maude does her best to get a black couple to attend the party but must settle for a disguised Florida. Arthur doesn't help the situation either after prescribing tranquilers to Maude who during the party mixes them with alcohol.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Returning home from shopping, Maude gets pulled over for speeding 34 miles in a 30 mph zone, but adamantly refuses to believe she was speeding at all. Later, during the trial, Maude tries all attempts to get out of paying the fine and prove her innocence.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: When Rose loses her job at the grief center, she begins searching for other sources of work. Meanwhile, Blanche tries to lose a few pounds and Dorothy is excited when a man she once had a crush on, contacts her and asks her out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose's sister, Lily must deal with life as a blind person after recently losing her sight. Meanwhile, the girls hold a garage sale in order to buy a new TV but find it hard to part with things.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche's father, Big Daddy, comes to Miami for a visit, with an announcement, he's sold the family plantation and is setting out to become a country singer. Meanwhile, Sophia places a curse on a neighbor who refuses to remove his tree that fell over onto the lanai during a storm.

programme.title: The Golden Palace
programme.desc: Blanche turns to her daughter Rebecca when her latest beau wants Blanche to bear his children.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Fred's toothache becomes an exercise in patience for Lamont when Fred refuses to see a dentist and instead tries Bubba's home remedy and a hypnotist. Finally, Fred decides to throw in the towel and visits a dentist but insists on a white dentist.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike continues to make decisions without consulting Gloria.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: When Archie finds out that one of Mike's students is babysitting Joey and she invited her hippie boyfriend over to listen to music, he takes over and brings Joey to his house, even though he is hosting a poker game with his buddies.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: It looks like Archie has turned over a new leaf when he befriends a Jewish man.

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.sub-title: Kathleen & Mary vs. Holly & Dianna vs. Donna & Kathy

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.sub-title: Ann & Sheila vs. Pat & Kathy vs. Mardine & Pam

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: The stooges are bumbling electricians who decide to go away for a rest after they are fired for their incompetence. The rest home they choose is run by Dr. Mallard, a quack who gyps the patients for everything they've got. When the boys discover the crooked goings on they escape, but not before Curly accidentally cures another patient who rewards him with a thousand dollars.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: The Stooges inherit a women's boutique and fashion clothing for their swanky customers.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: The stooges are government agent entrusted with protecting professor Snead, who has invented a super rocket fuel. Larry is mistaken for the professor by foreign agents who kidnap the trio and take them to the country of Anemia where they are ordered to produce the rocket fuel or be executed. The boys come up with a concoction they try to pass of as the real stuff, but are exposed when the real professor and his daughter are also kidnapped. The stooges help them escape, using their secret formula to fuel a jeep.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: The stooges make a whole batch of homemade beer, but get tossed in jail when Curly sells some to a cop. Their minor indiscretion turns into a forty year sentence when a keg of beer Curly has hidden under his coat explodes while the boys are being photographed. In prison the stooges get into more trouble with the warden and wind on the rockpile when they try to escape. Released as old men with long gray beards, the first thing Curly wants is a bottle of beer.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: Trying to patent a new fly-catching device, the Stooges calculate that they need to catch 100,000 flies to pay for it, but nearby crooks overhear their conversation. Unfortunately, they misunderstand the conversation, thinking that the Stoogies won $100,000, and chase the Stooges to get the winnings.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: The stooges do a good turn and help a stranger open a safe in what they think is the man's house. Actually the man is a crook and the boys were unwitting accomplices to a robbery. Once they realize what's happened, the stooges go after the bad guy and who's left on the train to Los Vegas. The boys trap the villain and recover the booty.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.desc: A professor bets one of his colleagues that he can turn the stooges into gentlemen within 60 days. With the aid of his pretty daughter, the professor tries to teach the boys proper etiquette. After many frustrating attempts, he introduces the stooges into society at a fancy party. At first things go all right, but the party soon degenerates into a wild pie fight.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: An Indian casino manager tells Bart what his future will be in thirty years' time. Whilst Lisa is the American president, Bart is a bum and wannabe musician, hanging out in a beach shack with Ralph Wiggum. Ever envious of Lisa, he causes her unpopularity by revealing that she is about to impose a new tax, but uses his slacker skills to stall matters long enough until she can push it through.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Realising that,as the town drunk,he has become a laughing stock,Barney quits drinking and takes up helicopter flying lessons. Lisa and Bart,meanwhile,aim to get their photos on the cover of the new phone book and have a photo session on Mount Springfield,where they accidentally start a forest fire. Fortunately the newly sober Barney,along with a drunk Homer,rescue them in the helicopter.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Fearing that he only has three more years to live, Homer takes the family on holiday to Florida where,after Homer has made a fool of himself at a rock concert,he accidentally runs over Captain Jack,the famous long-living alligator. The family flee but are eventually captured though when it transpires that the alligator is not dead,as feared,they are released on the condition they never return to Florida.

programme.title: Married... with Children
programme.desc: After Al falls out of his bedroom window and passes out, he claims he saw God's shoes. He decides to make and sell these shoes in order to make it big. Jefferson wants to join in and invests in Al's project with Marcy's money.

programme.title: Married... with Children
programme.desc: Al finally gets cable TV installed in the Bundy household, but he cannot find anything good to watch. All that changes when Kelly, gibed out of an appearance on a public access TV by her modeling school teacher, gets her own talk show on the air with just $35 from her girlfriends. "Vital Social Issues N' Stuff With Kelly," features an all girl band and some of her friends discussing subjects such as "mens butts" and "the slut of the week."

programme.title: Married... with Children
programme.desc: Al, Kelly, and Bud travel to Hollywood after Kelly's talk show becomes a hit with the TV networks in which Al tries to get into show business with his lame TV show ideas, Bud tries to score with some of the actresses, and Kelly is happy to be a star.

programme.title: Married... with Children
programme.desc: Mistaken identity turns Al from a shoe salesman into a P.I. hired by Vanessa Van Pelt, a young femme fatal who fears that her family members may interfere with her expected bequest of a priceless gem from her uncle. Before that can happen, the uncle is murdered, the gem disappears... and Al is left holding the knife.

programme.title: Married... with Children
programme.sub-title: So This Is How Sinatra Felt
programme.desc: Peggy sends Bud and Kelly to spy on Al at the shoe store for the day to confirm her suspicion that Al's recent giddiness is the work of an extramarital affair rather than Al's claim that he's only been flirting with a "shoe groupie" at the shoe store.

programme.title: Married... with Children
programme.desc: Al discovers that he truly has no possessions of his own, and decides to get back one of the things that truly meant a lot to him - his championship game ball.

programme.title: Married... with Children
programme.desc: As Grandmaster B, Bud does his coolest best while all over a girl who takes him out to non-traditional Bundy things such as rafting and sky diving. Meanwhile, Al and Peggy invite Marcy and Jefferson over to play a new board game called "Ethical Dilemma."

programme.title: Married... with Children
programme.desc: Al is asked to appear in an athletic shoe commercial. Al, being Polk High's 1966 all city running back and shoe salesman, is glad to reclaim his glory days. But he ends up being a punching bag by Ed "Too Tall" Jones, Steve Carlton, and Sugar Ray Leonard for the commercial.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: A tenant at The Sanford Arms doesn't have enough money for the rent so he leaves Fred his pet elephant as collateral. Fred quickly finds a city official on his back for keeping an elephant in the neighborhood and he quickly comes up with an idea to make some money: put on a mini-circus. Bubba plays a clown, Esther a fire-eater, and Lamont a weight lifter.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Lamont leaves town with Rollo to go on a fishing trip but before he goes, he makes a bet with Fred. He is sure Fred won't make money during the week he is gone. Fred sets to prove him wrong by renting out Lamont's room. Fred finds himself in a bind when the pregnant girl he boarded goes into labor.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Fred has been watching way too much television and Lamont suggests that he go out and get some exercise. Fred scoffs and refuses which leads to an argument which results in the television breaking. Lamont refuses to get it fixed until Fred agrees to start exercising. Lamont later brings in a doctor to hypnotize Fred to help him get over his television addiction.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Lamont has been seeing Janet for quite awhile and Lamont thinks he's in love. But he doesn't know too much about her and hasn't wanted to push her into telling him. Thus, Fred decides to find out exactly what she's hiding and he goes undercover with Aunt Esther to dig up the dirt.

programme.title: Get a Life
programme.desc: Chris decides on a whim to become a male escort, hoping for free plays and dates with young women. What he gets is a elderly woman who is hard up.

programme.title: Get a Life
programme.desc: After getting hit by her car, Chris falls for (and stalks) a doctor, later while stalking her, he starts getting stalked by the girl from the drugstore who has fallen for him.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: Bugs arrives in the desert to find Elmer prospecting for gold. Fudd is finally driven to pull his own gold tooth.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: A tour of the bright lights of New York City, where the various advertising signs come to life.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: Spot-gag cartoon centering on the news.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: Mama Buzzard wants her children to learn to bring back meat for dinner. One buzzardling is shy and has to be kicked out of the nest. He's told to at least bring back a rabbit.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: A series of spot gags to do with storybook characters. A narrator opens a book of Fairy Tales and on each page is a new story, another gag.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: Elmer Fudd, playing a Mountie, takes the opportunity to hunt down a wanted Bugs Bunny.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: A fox makes an error when he hears that silver foxes are highly prized, not realizing that only the skin is prized, not the fox it's attached to.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: Daffy Duck, suffering from hiccups, runs into Dr. Jerkyl. The doctor has a potion to help cure his condition.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head put on sunglasses and think they're virtual reality goggles.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis tries on yoga pants and can't get them off.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Lost in the woods, the boys hear a drumbeat and happen upon Van Driessen and his men's group -- having a monthly drum-banging session to let off steam as they ""wrestle with their manhood."" Beavis tries, and gets...a little carried away.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis starts repeating everything Butt-head says and does. Beavis starts repeating everything Butt-head says and does.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Peace, Love and Understanding is the second pilot episode of Beavis and Butt-head, after "Frog Baseball". Like creator Mike Judge's other early short cartoons, it was funded by Spike and Mike and shown on MTV's Liquid Television in the early 1990s. Mike Judge stated in an interview that he heavily disliked this particular episode, along with the season 1 episode "Give blood" which were both conceived on the same day.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc:
After calling a phone sex number, Beavis & Butt-head decide to get their own 900 number.
videos:
Eve's Plumb - "Blue"
Barry White - "Put Me In Your Mix"
Low Pop Suicide - "Kiss Your Lips"

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Middle-aged Beavis and Butt-Head fulfill their civic duty as jurors.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc:
Beavis & Butt-head go to the Medical Center. Butt-head gets nitrous at the dentist, Beavis gets an eye exam and a sucker.
videos:
DJ Jazzy Jeff & The Fresh Prince - "I Wanna Rock"
Kate Bush - "Love & Anger"

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Tantalized by a sexy yogurt advertisement on television, Beavis and Butt-Head decide they have to try some as soon as possible. Whey they get to the yogurt store they find the yogurt leaves a lot to be desired and the staff is less than sympathetic to their problems with it.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc:
Beavis and Butt-head win a radio contest and become disc jockeys for a day at KT&A radio.
videos:
Sonic Youth - "Dirty Boots"
Soundgarden - "Spoonman"
Greta - "Is It What You Wanted"

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: The boys reel in various things (and people) while casting from the couch, and then get Stewart in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Pee-wee's Playhouse
programme.desc: Today in the "Playhouse," Pee-wee tricks his friends into doing all of his chores by pretending that work is fun. The gang meets some new friends while renovating the "house." Reba arrives in time to deliver Clocky while the Playhouse gang uncovers Floory and meets Mrs. Rene for the first time.

programme.title: Pee-wee's Playhouse
programme.desc: The secret word of the day is "over." Cowntess shows home movies of her trip to Europe. A puppy shows up at the Playhouse, and Pee-wee names him Aloysius. Jambi is allergic to him. When Reba the mail lady shows up, they find out that Aloysius is really her lost puppy... They are reunited, and Pee-wee shows us how to make "macaroni art" with a portrait of the puppy.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: The diner gang helps Max and Caroline bake throughout the night in order to fulfill a gigantic cupcake order.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: After learning that Candy Andy closed down his shop after their breakup, Caroline visits a psychic for a reading about her love life in the future.

programme.title: WWF Prime Time Wrestling
programme.desc: Bobby "The Brain" Heenan joins Gorilla Monsoon to host another exciting edition of Prime Time Wrestling. In action, Mr. Perfect battles "Rugged" Ronnie Garvin in singles competition, Tito Santana faces "Iron" Mike Sharpe, and more. Plus, highlights from WrestleMania V.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: A new valley girl, Tammy, is like a totally bad influence on Tina; when thwarted, Tammy blackmails Tina with her own erotic friend fiction. Gene and Louise get really angry... nobody but them has the right to blackmail their sister! Bob is hands over heels for "Cake." It's like, tubular! He and Mr. Frond embarrass the kids at school while Tammy makes a noisy exit.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Ray hires his overwhelmingly annoying cousin Gerard to assist him, and Debra points out how alike the two men are, Ray is mortified. The whiny, nasal voice, the need to find something negative to say about everything, the stupid questions, you could be speaking about either Ray or Gerard.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is bewildered, but not altogether displeased when Debra starts initiating sex on a more than regular basis. He can't believe his luck, he is even willing to give up his golf game to satiate Debra's newfound desires. But he can't leave well enough alone, and decides to look into the reason behind his wife's sudden burst of energy.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug shows his romantic side as Carrie thinks he has lost it; Arthur serves on a jury.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug sees someone driving an R.V. and decides he wants to buy one for himself and Carrie's vacation, however Carrie is planning a trip to Paris for their vacation. So in deciding where to go, they flip a coin.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Immediately after proposing, George tries to postpone his marriage to Susan. Elaine becomes increasingly jealous of George's engagement and has a discussion with her neighbor, a rabbi, who then proceeds to tell the whole neighborhood. Kramer sneaks a caffé latte in the movie theater and burns himself, and he hires Jackie Chiles in an effort to sue the coffee shop.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A maestro impresses Elaine, jeopardizes Kramer's lawsuit and makes Jerry curious about housing in Italy.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Jackie's house buzzes with activity as Roseanne tries to hide David from Dan.

programme.title: Roseanne
programme.desc: Roseanne becomes involved in a family feud as Fred sues Jackie for custody of their unborn child; Mark and D.J. tease David for being unmanly.

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: Michael arranges a morale-boosting birthday party for Meredith and is determined to come up with the funniest message in her card. Dwight wants a pact with Jim to fight the downsizing, and Michael regrets showing off when Oscar asks for sponsorship for a charity walk being undertaken by his nephew, who has cerebral palsy.

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: The office staff play a basketball game against the warehouse workers in which Jim shows off to impress Pam and upstage her fiancee who is on the opposing team.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Inspired by a tango film, Lisa signs up for dance lessons but the teacher, ex-child star Vicki Valentine, specializes in tap, at which Ralph is surprisingly good but Lisa hopeless. Professor Frink gives her a pair of self-dancing shoes but they go out of control and Lisa has to be tripped up by Homer to disable them. Bart and Milhouse, meanwhile, go camping in the shopping mall, thwarting Wiggum's attempts to flush them out with a puma.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: It's a Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad Marge
programme.desc: Otto's girlfriend seems to be usurping Marge's role when she moves in with the family after a dispute over heavy metal.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A parody documentary in the style of the show 'Behind the Music' uses clips from previous episodes to show how the Simpsons first became famous and the problems that the fame brought them, culminating in an acrimonious break-up. However they all get back together again to appear in a supposed awards show hosted by Willie Nelson but specifically designed to engineer their reunion.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Bart can't pay the credit card bill for his expensive new purebred dog, the repo men unwittingly take Santa's Little Helper.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Old Man and the Lisa
programme.desc: When Burns is declared bankrupt,Lisa shows him how to make money out of recycling on condition that he becomes a full convert and renounces his grasping ways. The recycling plant is a success but he reneges on the deal to catch marine life to make 'Li'l Lisa Slurry'. Lisa refuses to take any of the profits and he sells the plant on.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Disturbed that Reverend Lovejoy has lost interest in counseling parishioners, Marge volunteers as the "Listen Lady." Meanwhile, Homer sees his likeness on a box of Japanese detergent.

programme.title: WWE Raw
programme.desc: The Undertaker reveals an ally that spells trouble for WWE Champion "Stone Cold" Steve Austin. The rivalry between DX and The Nation reaches the boiling point. The Hell in a Cell makes its return to Raw as Mankind confronts an old friend. Also, Jeff Jarrett plays a special tune for X-Pac, the Brawl for All Finals, and more.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira decides to cook dinner with the help of David. Johnny scopes out an office for his consulting business. And Alexis finally comes clean with Ted about their engagement.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira attempts to join the town’s a cappella group. Alexis enjoys the heady first days of her latest relationship. And Johnny helps out at Bob’s Garage despite himself.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: When Sophie takes Max and Caroline shopping for their bridesmaids’ dresses, the girls enlist the diner gang’s help to hide the ugliest ones, in the hopes of avoiding complete and utter humiliation.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.sub-title: And The Look Of The Irish
programme.desc: Max and Caroline try to break Nash into the modeling business in an effort to bring in extra money acting as his managers. Also, Sophie and Oleg attempt to keep celibate for 30 days before their wedding.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: Max and Caroline’s attempt to break Nash into the modeling business comes to a screeching halt when his mother arrives from Ireland to retrieve her son.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: Max and Caroline help launch the new branch of The High at JFK airport, and Sophie discovers that Oleg may have an ulterior motive for wanting to marry her.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: Max and Caroline are tasked with retrieving Sophie’s wedding dress from customs and safely transporting it to the church in time for her big wedding.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: Max and Caroline team up with the diner staff in a frantic attempt to keep their businesses open when the city targets Han's diner and their cupcake window for destruction. Also, Sophie and Oleg announce that they are trying to have a baby.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: When the shower at Max and Caroline's apartment breaks, they get part-time jobs at a fancy gym's juice bar and enjoy free use of the locker room. However, their jobs and free showers are jeopardized when Caroline has a run-in with a group of rich moms who are jealous of the attention she's getting from a sexy trainer.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: Caroline's ex Andy returns and she is denial over how they broke up. And when he informs her that he's about to get married, she offers to make the wedding cake. And she is constantly wondering if she made a mistake breaking up with him. And she tries to find wrong with him but can't.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: Max and Caroline's cupcake shop is boycotted after they refuse to sell cupcakes to "I", an artist who wants to put cocktail weenies in them.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: Han insists the diner gang attends a mandatory night out in an "Escape Room Club" when he feels they aren't working together as a team. However, once they're locked inside the "Alice in Wonderland"-themed room, they find Han has an ulterior motive.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.sub-title: And The Not Regular Down There
programme.desc: Max is both puzzled and curious when the new guy she is dating expresses hesitations about intimacy because he is "not regular down there." Also, Sophie and Oleg struggle to get pregnant.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: When Caroline's grandmother Astrid awakens from a coma with no knowledge of her family's massive money scandal, Caroline attempts to keep the truth hidden for a bit longer by giving Astrid one last fancy luncheon.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: Oleg's pro-basketball playing cousin comes to town to play a game against Max's favorite team and gifts her with two free tickets, but chaos ensues when the girls interfere with the game and risk ruining their cupcake business' reputation in the process.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: When Earl is not invited to play with his old jazz band at their reunion show, Max and the diner gang join forces in order to get him back on stage performing.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: When Max reconnects with an old friend, Caroline’s jealousy inspires her to try to make some new friends of her own.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls
programme.desc: Max and Caroline sign up to be "booth babes" in order to get into a huge gaming convention for free. Once inside, they're shocked to see that Han's friend has created video game characters based on them, and demand compensation.

programme.title: Ted Lasso
programme.desc: After the semifinal, Beard sets out on an all-night odyssey through London in an effort to collect his thoughts.

programme.title: Ted Lasso
programme.desc: Rebecca is stunned by a sudden loss. The team rallies to show their support, but Ted finds himself grappling with a piece of his past.

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: A flood of organized crime parolees changes the landscape of the Soprano/Lupertazzi alliance. Janice carries on the family's Sunday dinner tradition. Carmela and A.J. commune with local wildlife. Christopher balks at footing the bill on 'goomar night.' Tony tries to introduce Dr. Melfi to his 'other' self.

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tony sizes up a contractor's gift, then reunites with his paroled cousin, Tony Blundetto. Paulie and Christopher relive some not-so-special memories. Carmela launches a film club. Adriana grapples with her guilt. A familiar figure 'crosses over.'

programme.title: The Good Place
programme.desc: Michael makes a plea. Eleanor looks to take the high road. Michael tries to pull a rabbit out of a hat.

programme.title: The Good Place
programme.desc: Michael intervenes in the near-death accidents of Eleanor, Chidi, Tahani and Jason on Earth, in hopes that a second chance at life allows them to become better versions of themselves.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As ancient grudges resurface, Rhaenys suggests that Alicent may see reason while the men around her seek bloodshed. Ser Criston proposes a bold scheme. Daemon arrives at Harrenhal to raise an army for the Blacks.

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Robert has been injured while hunting and is dying. Jon and the others finally take their vows to the Night's Watch. A man, sent by Robert, is captured for trying to poison Daenerys. Furious, Drogo vows to attack the Seven Kingdoms.

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Eddard and his men are betrayed and captured by the Lannisters. When word reaches Robb, he plans to go to war to rescue them. The White Walkers attack The Wall. Tyrion returns to his father with some new friends.

programme.title: House
programme.desc: Foreman bonds with the patient of the week, a 16-year-old Romani boy admitted after suddenly becoming unable to breathe during a make-out session with his girlfriend. Meanwhile, House loses his parking space to a new research doctor, Dr. Whitner, and makes a wager with Cuddy to get it back.

programme.title: House
programme.desc: It's Valentine's Day, and Cuddy has a blind date. Meanwhile, House leaves ER duty to take the case of a child patient named Hannah.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A hardworking new employee at the power plant is consumed with resentment at Homer's undeserved success.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Troy McClure presents three Simpsons spinoff spoofs: In "Chief Wiggum, P.I.," Chief Wiggum becomes a New Orleans detective. Next, Grampa Simpson's soul is trapped inside Moe's Love tester machine in "The Love-Matic Grampa." Finally, the Simpson family hosts a '70s-style variety show.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Secret War of Lisa Simpson
programme.desc: Lisa joins the all-male military school where Bart is sent for discipline. Then comes the hazing.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The City of New York vs. Homer Simpson
programme.desc: Designated driver Barney absconds to Manhattan in Homer's car and leaves it there. But when the family journeys to the Big Apple to retrieve their property, Homer discovers his car has been booted.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Unmasked as an impostor, Principal Skinner flees to Capital City to reclaim his former life as a shiftless good-for-nothing. The people of Springfield gain a newfound appreciation for him and form a plan to bring him back.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After Lisa’s saxophone is destroyed, the Simpsons reminisce about how she originally got the instrument. On the hottest day of the year, Homer must decide whether to buy an air conditioner or replace Lisa’s sax.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: In “The Homega Man,” Homer faces a post-apocalyptic Springfield. Next, Bart attempts to become Superfly in "Fly vs. Fly." In “Easy-Bake Coven,” amidst a witch hunt in 1649, Marge and her sisters invent trick-or-treating.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Alarmed by a soccer riot, Homer buys a handgun. His reckless behavior drives Marge and the kids out of the house, and even his new gun club buddies desert him.

programme.title: You Can't Do That on Television
You Can't Do That on Television
You Can't Do That on Television
programme.desc: Only one scene remains in existence from this episode. In the scene Tim is the dungeon and is told not to pull the chains. He does not listen and gets slimed.

programme.title: MXC
programme.desc: It's Churchfolks & Queer as Folks as the Religious Right takes on Gay Rights. It's the classic battle of bible stories vs. fairy tales. Games - Amazing Grace, Sinkers & Floaters, Dope on a Rope & Rotating Surfboard of Death.

programme.title: MXC
programme.desc: Today, it's crime fighters and kilobiters as world famous superheroes take on the world of MySpace... It's the classic battle of Heroes and Freaks vs. emailing geeks. Games - Slippery Slope of Death, Dash to Death, Log Drop & Pole Riders.

programme.title: MXC
programme.sub-title: Sexual Pioneers vs. The World of Violent Films
programme.desc: It's Night stalkers and Silk Stockings, as Violent Movies takes on Sexual Pioneers and Lingerie. It's the classic battle of Scarfacers versus the leather and lacers. Games - Great Holes of Glory, Log Drop, One & One Make #2 & Irritable Bowl Syndrome.

programme.title: MXC
programme.desc: It's hard lovin' and hard labor as celebrated chick magnets take on famous felons. It's the classic battle of ladies mens vs. state pens. Games - Cut the Cheese, Sinkers & Floaters, Dead End Zone, Eat Shitake.

programme.title: MXC
programme.desc: It's punch lines and bungee cords, as the stars of comedy take on the stars of "Jackass." It's the classic battle of non-stop yuks vs. stapled nuts. Games - Sprayed and Neutered, Boulder Dash, Door Jammed & Rotating Surfboard of Death.

programme.title: MXC
programme.sub-title: The Young and Rich vs. Men's Magazines
programme.desc: It's idle money and sexy bunnies as the young and rich take on the men's magazine industry. It's the classic battle of spoiled jetsetters vs. Penthouse petters. Games - Rump Bumpers, Hand Job, Dash to Death & Pole Riders.

programme.title: MXC
programme.desc: It's constipation and conservation as those with food disorders take on the environmental industry. It's the classic battle of diet pills versus dying seals. Games - Survivor - Seamen Island, Log Drop, Ball Busters & Brass Balls.

programme.title: MXC
programme.sub-title: Hot Chicks of Primetime vs. Hot Celebrity Moms
programme.desc: It's beautiful babes and baby buggies, as the ladies of primetime TV take on hot celebrity moms. It's the classic battle of collagen lips vs. spreading hips. Games - Pinheads, Sinkers & Floaters, Irritable Bowl Syndrome & Brass Balls.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Jake has a heart attack and his mother comes to the Morgendorffer household to take care of him; his heart attack inspires Quinn to study to become a heart doctor; two radio DJs broadcast their show outside Lawndale High.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Daria and Quinn have to take a road trip to bail Jane and Trent out of a traffic violation.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Secret service agents visit Lawndale High, and urge students to keep an eye of for students that might be different, and thus a threaten their safety, as well as the safety of the country. Though Daria & Jane become suspect numbers one and two, they actually start to notice an outbreak of weirdness among their fellow students, faculty members, and even relatives.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: The whole school goes on a mandatory-voluntary harbor cruise to raise money via casino gambling.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Jane starts dating a guy, to the annoyance of her misanthropic friend Daria.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: For an economics project, Daria and Jodie team up to start a company.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: While on a hill trek, Daria's class gets caught in an unexpected snowstorm.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: A football injury sidelines star quarterback Kevin, forcing him to re-evaluate his life for a minute or two.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.sub-title: One of Our Stately Homes is Missing
programme.desc: The Duke of Bedbug's stately mansion has been stolen and is currently sailing up to sea. Hannibal Hogarty and his team of highly trained elephants are holding it to ransom, so DM and Penfold team up with B.L.E.E.P. (the Building Location and Emergency Expedition Platoon), led by Dangermouse's old pal Mad Major Melvin.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: The alien J.J. Quark returns and sends a Fangboner to attack Danger Mouse.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Penfold must defeat El Loco after he drugs Danger Mouse's milk.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Colonel K has been kidnapped by a mechanical cat called Paws. Danger Mouse and Penfold race to castle Nasty, where their chinchilla in charge is being held. However, they are unaware that the feline fiend has fed the secret details of Danger Mouse's brainwaves into his computerized brain (after stealing them from the Colonel's filing cabinet). Thus Paws is able to anticipate every move the mouse makes before he actually does them.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.sub-title: The Good, the Bad and the Motionless
programme.desc: Dangermouse and Penfold are send to investigate a weird disturbance at Stonehenge on All Hallow's Eve. Once there, DM is ambushed by his own suppressed evil side, who freezes time in order to take control over the heroic 98 per cent of him.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Greenback devises a ray that animates London's statues and causes them to wreak havoc.

programme.title: Beakman's World
programme.desc: Beakman provides answers for allergy sufferers; cryptic world of codes.

programme.title: Beakman's World
programme.desc: Beakman investigates the world of snakes; a bee sting is treated.

programme.title: Beakman's World
programme.desc: Tornadoes; firefighting and fire-prevention.

programme.title: Beakman's World
programme.desc: How seeds grow; the evolution of bridges.

programme.title: Beakman's World
programme.desc: Balance and animals' use of camouflage.

programme.title: Bill Nye: The Science Guy
programme.desc: There's something in the air. Bill Nye's scientific lecture is all about the atmosphere, its five different levels, and how it protects the Earth. He also soars into the heavy topic of atmospheric air pressure and radio waves.

programme.title: Bill Nye: The Science Guy
programme.desc: Bill Nye gets aerobic about the importance of respiration when he jogs, bikes, swims, and scuba dives. Discover how to measure how much air each breath contains, and make a model lung in a nifty home experiment. See a demonstration of how cigarette smoke can infiltrate and injure lungs.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball seeks justice when Banana Joe chews Darwin's pen.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Darwin develops a texting addiction when he and Gumball get their first cell phone.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Richard gets a job as a pizza delivery man, which worries Nicole when strange things begin to occur around the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball, Darwin and Anais go to a haunted-house party.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Anais hunts for hidden treasure after uncovering a secret.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Miss Simian owes Gumball an apology.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Darwin tries to be more direct with Gumball as his teacher.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: The guys befriend a compulsive liar.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Bobert becomes Gumball's servant and obeys every command he receives.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Santa Claus is coming to town. Unfortunately he gets run over by the Wattersons, so it's up to them to save Christmas.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.sub-title: The Day the Night Stopped Beginning to Shine and Became Dark Even Though It Was the Day - Chapter Two: The Story in Your Eyes
programme.desc: Without Cyborg, Beast Boy feels lost and sets out to find himself, but ends up meeting a music legend.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.sub-title: The Day the Night Stopped Beginning to Shine and Became Dark Even Though It Was the Day - Chapter Three: Playing Hard to Get
programme.desc: The Titans return to the alternate reality to save Cyborg but will they be able to defeat the dragon?

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.sub-title: The Day the Night Stopped Beginning to Shine and Became Dark Even Though It Was the Day - Chapter Four: The Night Begins to Shine
programme.desc: In a final epic battle, the Titans and their musician friends square off against the dragon for control of the Night Begins to Shine.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin introduces the other Titans to a money-making application but they soon learn the dangers of a shareconomy.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin uses Labor Day as an opportunity to teach the other Titans about the importance of labor.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Control Freak attempts to prove his point about classic superhero cartoons by sending the Titans to a former version of "Teen Titans Go!"

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: The Titans build an AI robot so it will create a pizza that's never been made before.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Batman and Commissioner Gordon have a slumber party and watch their favorite TV shows.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Batman and Commissioner Gordon have a slumber party and watch their favorite TV shows.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.sub-title: Justice League's Next Top Talent Idol Star (1)
programme.desc: The Justice League holds a talent competition to find a superhero worthy of joining their team and Robin tries everything to win.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show
programme.desc: Stimpy starts his journey into teenagedom, complete with all of its trials & tribulations.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show
programme.desc: Ren thinks TV has ruined Stimpy's mind, but when Stimpy wins a televised Gritty Kitty Litter contest and becomes a Hollywood star on the Muddy Muddskipper show, he leaves Ren behind.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show
programme.desc: When Ren falls ill, it's Nurse Stimpy to the rescue, swearing by the Sacred Bedpan to cure his friend. Will the constant care lead to a cured Chihuahua, or a total relapse?

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show
programme.desc: During a 36-year mission to the Crab Nebula, Commander Höek succumbs to Space Madness and puts Cadet Stimpy in charge of the mysterious History Eraser Button!

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy need new jobs, so they disguise themselves as Dalmatians, go to work for a psychotic fire chief, and battle a 40-story building fire, saving Mr. Horse and others!

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head miss the schoolbus and decide to take a shortcut home.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Butt-head orders a mail-order bride from Russia to ""get some;"" Beavis wants to watch.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Burger World starts a new delivery service; the boys make the first -- and last -- run.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: During wood shop class the boys saw everything they can get their hands on, Beavis then must be rushed to the hospital after an accident happens involving tons of blood, the table saw, and Beavis's finger.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Stewart's family gets a satellite dish; the boys try to enjoy 200 channels of violence despite Stew's mom.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head find a can of root beer and really, really... really shake it up before they open it.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: The guys decide to start a band, get a gig, pick a cool name, break up and reminisce about it...all in one day.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: The boys visit an impotence specialist to find out why they're not scoring.

programme.title: Double Dare
programme.sub-title: Crazy Crack-Ups (Matt & Cas) vs. Wrecking Crew (Courtney & Kristen)

programme.title: You Can't Do That on Television
programme.desc: Lisa keeps scheming to get Bradfield slimed, but her plans keep backfiring and result in her getting slimed several times.
